description.value: Aura faint illusion; CL 3rd; Slot shoulders; Price 2,500 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION These cloaks of famed elven design are enhanced to reflect the wearerâs surroundings, aiding him in blending in with any terrain. When this plain gray cloak is worn with the hood drawn up around the head, the wearer gains a +5 competence bonus on Stealth checks. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, invisibility; Special creator must be an elf; Cost 1,250 gp.
